description: Style Note Adopt a winning attitude with this T-shirt from puma. The stylish graphic print gives this tee a stunning look and the soft cotton fabric gives you exemplary comfort all day long. Pair this with jeans and casual shoes Product Details White t-shirt with a round ribbed neck, short sleeves, has graphic print, flock print and branding in rubber print on the front Material and Care 100% cotton Wash separately in cool water Do not use bleach or dry clean Warm iron; Do not iron on decorations Size and Fit Regular Fit The model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
